intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

compositional_truth_check.process: Performed a comparative visual audit of the 5-day sequence against the registry. First, I mapped the spatial coordinates of each pot, then validated the presence of biological matter against the expected species.

inventory_reconciliation.P1_String_of_Nickels: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but contains no visible foliage.
inventory_reconciliation.P2_Mexican_Mint: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but contains no visible foliage.
inventory_reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Present: Anchor (White Rabbit) remains; Pothos leaf is visible but shows signs of decline.
inventory_reconciliation.P4_Silver_Guest: Systemic Loss: No evidence of the specimen in the shared pot.
inventory_reconciliation.New_Introductions: Electronic components (IC chip/connector) observed in early images; white charging case introduced in current image.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: Single leaf present, showing chlorosis and marginal necrosis.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil, no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of crushed eggshells (calcium amendment) in P3/P4 area; electronic debris present in early frames.

temporal_deltas.T_earliest_to_T_minus_3: Minimal change; P3 leaf remains turgid.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_2_to_T_minus_1: Significant postural collapse of the P3 leaf; loss of structural integrity.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1_to_current: Leaf in P3 remains in a state of advanced senescence; no new growth observed.

visual_health_inference.P3_Pothos: Critical/Terminal: The specimen is failing to maintain turgor pressure. The lack of secondary growth suggests a failure in the root system or severe environmental stress.
visual_health_inference.P1_P2_P4: Dead/Lost: No viable plant tissue remains.

anomalies: Electronic component (IC chip) in early images.
White charging case (AirPods style) in current image.
Crushed eggshells used as soil top-dressing.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of advanced decline. Of the four registered plants, only one (P3) retains any biological material, and it is currently in a state of terminal senescence. The environment appears to be used for storage of non-botanical items (electronics), which may be contributing to the neglect of the botanical specimens. The soil is devoid of life, and the lack of moisture suggests a cessation of maintenance protocols.
